footer.description: Air conditioners from leading brands with delivery and professional installation across Bulgaria.

hero.title: Sales & Professional AC Installation in Varna
hero.subtitle: Authorized dealer for Daikin, Mitsubishi, Gree. Turnkey installation with warranty up to 5 years.

trust.originalDesc: Authorized dealer for Daikin, Mitsubishi, Gree. In-house installation crew in Varna and full manufacturer warranty.
trust.deliveryDesc: Same-day dispatch for requests before noon. We cover all of Varna and Varna region.
trust.installationDesc: Clean installation with vacuum by our own crew. Fixed price — no hidden fees.

brands.title: Brands
brands.subtitle: We work with world-leading air conditioning manufacturers.

about.title: About Us
about.subtitle: Pesnopoets Clima is an authorized dealer of leading air conditioning brands in Bulgaria. We offer a full range of services — from consultation and selection, through delivery, to professional installation and warranty service.
about.teamParagraph: Behind Pesnopoets Clima is a team of specialists with years of experience in HVAC systems. Our priority is to offer every client a solution tailored to their space and budget — honestly, professionally, and without pressure.

values.title: Original Products
values.desc: We work directly with manufacturers. All products come with full warranty.

values.title: Delivery Across Bulgaria
values.desc: Fast delivery to your address. Real-time availability.

values.title: Professional Installation
values.desc: Installation by certified specialists with years of experience.

values.title: After-Sales Service
values.desc: Warranty and out-of-warranty service. Always available.

uslugi.pageSubtitle: Installation, maintenance and repair of air conditioners by our own crew in Varna.

services.title: AC Installation
services.desc: Turnkey professional install — from delivery to commissioning. Clean work with a vacuum, fixed price.
items: Copper line up to 3 m, insulated

services.title: Maintenance & cleaning
services.desc: Annual upkeep — filters, coils and indoor unit cleaning. Proper maintenance extends AC life by years.

services.title: Repair & diagnostics
services.desc: We find and fix the issue. We work with all brands. Firm quote after diagnostics.

whyItems.title: Our own crew in Varna
whyItems.desc: We don't subcontract — we work with people we know personally.

whyItems.title: Fixed pricing
whyItems.desc: Price agreed before work starts. No hidden extras.

whyItems.title: Workmanship warranty
whyItems.desc: 12-month warranty on every install and repair. If something fails — we come back for free.

uslugi.ctaDesc: Call us or leave a request — we'll advise for free.

checkout.name: Name
checkout.noPaymentNotice: No online payment — a manager will contact you to confirm.

montazh.pageSubtitle: Transparent pricing. Fixed rates. Clean install with vacuum.
montazh.tableSubtitle: Price covers all materials and labour for a trace up to 3 m between indoor and outdoor units.
montazh.extrasSubtitle: Added to the base when needed — always agreed in advance.
montazh.beforeAfterSubtitle: Real sites — before and after install by our crew
montazh.noteText: Listed prices are averages for the city of Varna and Varna region. For non-standard jobs (high elevation, awkward access, special materials) prices may differ. A firm quote is issued after a free on-site survey.
montazh.ctaDesc: Our crew will visit your site in Varna, take measurements and provide a written quote.

contact.title: Contact
contact.subtitle: Get in touch for consultation, quotes or questions.
contact.mapSubtitle: We serve the entire city and Varna region

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: This page describes how we collect and use your personal data when using our website.
privacy.dataText: When filling out the inquiry form, we collect: name, phone number, email (optional), and message. This data is used solely to process your inquiry.

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.intro: By using this website, you accept these terms of service.
terms.pricesText: All prices are in Bulgarian Lev including VAT. Prices and availability are updated automatically every 2 hours. Discrepancies between displayed and actual availability may occur.
